Kql: datatable(i:int)[ 3, int(null), 1, 2 ] | sort by i asc nulls first
print a = gettype(parse_json("123")), b = gettype(parse_json('"hi"')), c = gettype(parse_json("1.5"))
let a=datatable(k:long,v:long)[1,10,2,20]; let b=a|summarize count() by k; let c=b|extend count_=count_*2; c | project k, count_ | sort by k asc
datatable(t:long,v:long)[1,10,2,20,3,30] | sort by t asc | serialize p = prev(v, 1, -1)
datatable(t:long)[1,2,3] | sort by t asc | serialize rn = row_number(5)
datatable(g:string,v:long)[ "a",5, "a",3, "b",8, "b",1, "b",2 ] | sort by g asc, v desc | serialize cs = row_cumsum(v, g != prev(g))
